public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as ferry marshal.
appearance: Cold-ready layered gear, ward-conscious fastening, and containment-minded kit signal disciplined caution.
manner: Balances command voice with practiced observation, sounding like someone who expects trouble to hide inside normality. In Sheresh Communes, that reads as someone curious, controlled, and alert to magical contamination, speaking like someone used to careful containment, and the habits of a ferry marshal still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of ferry marshal in and around Sheresh Dome Road, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Sheresh Dome Road workable through the obligations of ferry marshal while managing the immediate pressure of contamination strain in Sheresh Communes.
hidden_pressure: Must notice trouble early enough that force remains legitimate rather than merely reactive. Around Sheresh Dome Road, that usually means carrying contamination strain, calendar contradiction, tundra hazard without letting the role of ferry marshal visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Any task accepted from Sylvi Rimebridge may turn into an escort, checkpoint, or route-control problem before the destination is reached.
Sylvi Rimebridge needs outside hands to handle a breach, seizure, or violent disturbance before it spreads through Sheresh Dome Road.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Uniform, posture, and the way others make room mark Sylvi Rimebridge as visible enforcement before rank ever needs to be named.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Sheresh Dome Road: checkpoints, barracks, patrol seams, or visible trouble-spots
encounter_context.interaction_anchor: threshold control or rapid incident response
